metadata.title: Veneers | Lumineers - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.ogDescription: Veneers | Lumineers Veneers and Lumineers are very thin pieces of durable, tooth shaped porcelain that are custom made (for shape and color) by a professional dental laboratory.  They are bonded onto the front of teeth to create a beautiful and attractive smile. Veneers and lumineers can completely reshape your teeth and smile.  They […]
